description.en: Raised when a node is inserted in a different document than it currently belongs to, and the implementation does not support migrating the node from one document to the other.

excerpt.es: Raised when a node is inserted in a different document than it currently belongs to, and the implementation does not support migrating the node from one document to the other.
excerpt.en: Raised when a node is inserted in a different document than it currently belongs to, and the implementation does not support migrating the node from one document to the other.
